_comment: SA-B3 Stellaris Auction House voice content. Velo lines on the floor (ceremonial register, present tense, names lots neutrally). Rival flat-bid templates honor each persona's voice sheet. Post-session lines split by attendance and outcome. Voice-checked against character_voices.md and dialogue_writing_guide.md.

velo_lines.we_are_at: We are at {current_high_bid}. Do we hear more?
velo_lines.lot_closed_withdrawn: The reserve is not met. The lot is withdrawn.
velo_lines.session_open: We have lots prepared for the floor today. Standard terms apply. The session is open.
velo_lines.session_close: The session is closed. Thank you for attending.
velo_lines.snipe_window_extended: We hold the floor a moment longer. The lot remains open.
velo_lines.exceptional_lot_pause: A pause on this one. The lot is open.

rival_won: Prentiss takes the lot at the price the room held. He does not look at you.
Prentiss closes on the lot. He notes the page in his catalogue and turns it.
Prentiss carries it. The bid was small and certain, and the lot was his.
player_won: Prentiss does not congratulate you. He marks the lot in his catalogue and moves on.
Prentiss reads the next entry. He does not look up.
Prentiss accepts the result. The recalibration is internal.
no_overlap: Prentiss attended. He did not bid against you on the lots you wanted.
Prentiss watched the floor. His attention rested elsewhere this session.
Prentiss attended the session. The lots that drew him were not yours.
absent_retired: Prentiss has not been on the floor for a while.
Prentiss did not attend. The seat he prefers stayed empty.
Prentiss was not in the room today.

rival_won: Kade closes on the lot. She consults her notes once, then logs the price.
The Guild takes the lot. Kade is already reviewing the next entry.
Kade carries it for procurement. She thanks Velo and steps back.
player_won: Kade nods once. She marks the result and steps back.
Kade logs the outcome and reaches for her case. She will report the ceiling.
Kade accepts the result without comment. The Guild will review.
no_overlap: Kade attended. The session offered nothing on her acquisition list this round.
Kade was present. Her ceiling was not engaged on the lots in front of you.
Kade reviewed the catalogue. The Guild's interests sat with other entries.
absent_retired: Kade has not been on the floor in a while.
Kade did not attend. Procurement sent no representative this session.
Kade was not in the room today.

rival_won: Salko picks up his catalogue. That is all.
Salko takes the lot. He does not look at you.
Salko logs the price. Brief. Settled.
player_won: Salko sets the catalogue down. He files it.
Salko nods once and turns the page. He is building a picture.
Salko gives no reaction. The session is in the ledger.
no_overlap: Salko was here. He bid where he chose.
Salko attended. The lots that brought him were not the ones in front of you.
Salko sat through the session. He did not engage on the lots you wanted.
absent_retired: Salko has not been on the floor in a while.
Salko did not show. His seat was open.
Salko was not in the room today.

sable_reads.ceiling_correct: Ceilings landed within the band I called. The room is reading clean.
sable_reads.ceiling_off: Two of the ceilings ran past my call. I will adjust for next session.
sable_reads.no_rivals_attended: No named rivals on the floor today. The reads are quieter without them.

empty_state: Velo: "The next session is in {gap_days} days. The floor is quiet between sessions."
retired_rival: {display_name} has not been on the floor in a while.

consigned_lot_lines.lot_open: The lot is open. {lot_headline}. Provenance held by the consignor.
consigned_lot_lines.we_are_at: We are at {current_high_bid}. The reserve has not yet been called.
consigned_lot_lines.lot_closed_sold: Sold. {lot_headline}, at {current_high_bid}. Credits to the consignor.
consigned_lot_lines.lot_closed_withdrawn: The reserve is not met. The lot returns to the consignor.
consigned_lot_lines.empty_inventory: Velo: "There is nothing on consignment from your hand today."

player_listing_post_session.sold_above_reserve: The room paid past the reserve. The lot read true and the credits cleared.
player_listing_post_session.sold_near_reserve: Hammer landed near the reserve. The room held the price you set.
player_listing_post_session.withdrawn_no_bids: No buyers stepped to the floor. The catalogue carried other lots.
player_listing_post_session.withdrawn_bids_below_reserve: Bids came in. None reached the reserve. The room held its limit.
